summary.health_score_note: Simple average of 8 scored on-site categories (Technical 86, Sitemap 90, Content 74, Schema 78, Performance 48, Visual/Mobile 80, GEO 79, E-commerce 64) = 599/8 = 74.9, rounded to 75. Up from 60/100 on 2026-07-19 (that score excluded Performance, which hadn't finished; this run includes it). SXO (40) and Backlinks (8) are shown separately as diagnostic/off-page context, not folded into this number, consistent with the prior audit's methodology.
summary.business_type: E-commerce — industrial equipment reseller (shipping containers, refrigerated containers, tanks, generators, trailers/chassis), direct-to-buyer, 208 SKUs across 8 categories
top_findings: Critical, newly surfaced: the SXO specialist found zero appearances of containeronedepot.com in Google results for any target query, including a direct search for the brand name itself — competing near-identical-brand domains (containerone.net, containerone.com, containerdepotco.com) filled the results instead. This needs a Google Search Console indexation check before any other fix matters, since no on-page work converts traffic that never arrives.

Critical performance regression left behind by the image-hosting fix: next.config.ts still sets images.unoptimized: true, a leftover from the old third-party-hotlinking workaround. Now that images are self-hosted this flag serves every image at full resolution with no responsive srcset or WebP/AVIF conversion, driving mobile LCP to 10.6s-18.5s (Performance score 48/100) — the single highest-leverage fix available.

New checkout bugs undermine the trust improvements this audit was sent to validate: the flat $1,000 deposit (commit 49fc49d) exceeds the full sale price on 12 low-ticket accessory SKUs (e.g. a $64.80 lock box), the checkout page shows no visible order summary despite the commit message claiming one was added, and no return-policy text appears anywhere on the $1,000-deposit page.

Merchant Center blockers persist: 197 of 208 products (95%) still lack a GTIN/MPN/SKU identifier, and 91 of 208 (44%) collapse New/Used condition into a single price/Offer — both will keep blocking or demoting Shopping listings regardless of on-page SEO quality.

All three Critical bugs fixed live during the 2026-07-19 audit are confirmed still fixed and holding: self-hosted product images (zero broken, zero hotlinked), correct Product-schema image URLs, and full server-rendered description text. Both top GEO gaps from that audit are also now shipped (llms.txt live, FAQPage schema + visible FAQ on every product page) — GEO jumped 58→79, Content 52→74, Schema 62→78, Sitemap 88→90, Technical 78→86.
quick_wins: Remove `images.unoptimized: true` from next.config.ts now that images are self-hosted (~1-2 hrs code change + re-encode source images) — expected 60-90% image payload reduction and the most direct fix for the 17.5s mobile LCP
Cap the checkout deposit at item price for the 12 sub-$1,000 accessory SKUs in `depositFor()` (src/lib/cart-context.tsx) (~1 hr)
Add a visible order-summary panel (unit name/thumbnail/price) to /cart/checkout before the submit button, and surface the return-policy text on the same page (~2-3 hrs)
Remove the stray `thermo-king-sg-3000-clip-on-gensets-1` redirected URL still sitting in the sitemap, and add a pre-publish filter that drops any 3xx-responding URL automatically (~1 hr)
Check Google Search Console URL Inspection on the homepage and top PDPs to diagnose the zero-visibility finding — this is free to check and could be the single highest-impact discovery of this audit

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: Security headers (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, HSTS) now shipped sitewide via next.config.ts headers()
Sitemap lastmod now correctly tied to real catalog-regeneration timestamps (222/225 URLs), not a blanket 'now' stamp
Homepage and product pages remain edge-cached and fully prerendered; new /llms.txt live for AI crawlers
Clean robots.txt, single-hop www/https consolidation, correct canonicals, legacy-slug redirects intact

findings.title: Content-Security-Policy still missing
findings.description: 4 of 5 recommended security headers shipped; CSP deliberately deferred pending nonce-based middleware for Next.js hydration scripts.
findings.recommendation: Add nonce-issuing middleware and ship a baseline CSP scoped to the actual asset hosts.

findings.title: Category hub pages still fully dynamic/uncached — root cause now identified
findings.description: All 8 category pages serve Cache-Control: private, no-store because the route reads searchParams for filter/sort/pagination, which forces the entire App Router route dynamic despite generateStaticParams() being present.
findings.recommendation: Split the static product-grid shell from the searchParams-dependent filter UI (client component + Suspense, or Partial Prerendering).

findings.title: Sitemap lastmod missing on 3 static pages
findings.description: /about, /contact, /blog index still lack lastmod (222/225 other URLs now have it).
findings.recommendation: Add a static lastModified tied to real content edits for these 3 routes.

findings.title: Two-hop redirect for bare-HTTP apex
findings.description: http://containeronedepot.com takes 2 hops to reach the canonical host.
findings.recommendation: Collapse to a single redirect at the DNS/edge layer.

findings.title: No IndexNow integration
findings.description: No IndexNow key file found.
findings.recommendation: Add an IndexNow key and push URL changes on publish.

findings.title: /cart and /search resolve 200 with no noindex
findings.description: Disallowed via robots.txt but not blocked from indexing if externally linked.
findings.recommendation: Add meta noindex to both routes.

categories.name: Sitemap
what_works: Valid flat urlset, 225 URLs matching live site structure exactly, no duplicates
lastmod coverage jumped from 4/229 to 222/225 URLs
Prior near-duplicate SKU pair (10ft-refrigerated-container(s)) correctly 301/308-merged and removed from sitemap

findings.title: New redirected URL slipped into sitemap: thermo-king-sg-3000-clip-on-gensets-1
findings.description: This URL 308-redirects to its canonical, which is also separately listed — same defect class as the fixed near-duplicate pair, but a fresh unaddressed instance.
findings.recommendation: Remove it; add a pre-publish filter that drops any 3xx-responding URL from the sitemap.

findings.title: 218 non-blog URLs share one identical, non-differentiated lastmod timestamp
findings.description: Coverage is now 98.7% but the value is a single build timestamp, not a true per-page freshness signal.
findings.recommendation: Derive lastmod from real updatedAt (price/spec/stock change) rather than a global build timestamp.

findings.title: Deprecated priority/changefreq present on every URL
findings.description: Google ignores both; harmless.
findings.recommendation: Optional cleanup.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Crawler-hiding truncation bug fully fixed — complete descriptions now server-rendered with CSS line-clamp
Real business address and expanded About/Contact trust content live in production
Per-product FAQ blocks + /llms.txt shipped since prior audit, boosting AI citation readiness to 78/100
No factual errors; rewritten product descriptions remain specific and technical

findings.title: Blog remains thin — still only 4 posts, still no bylines
findings.description: No post added since prior audit; 150-190 words each, no author name/credential anywhere.
findings.recommendation: Expand toward the ~1,500-word floor and add named, credentialed bylines.

findings.title: No verifiable third-party credentials, licensing, or certifications anywhere
findings.description: Business has no confirmed ASME/DOT/ISO licensing or founding-year history to publish; chose honesty over fabrication, but caps the Authoritativeness ceiling.
findings.recommendation: Surface any real credentials that exist; otherwise pursue a Google Business Profile and BBB listing.

findings.title: Category pages still have no unique topical copy
findings.description: Single tagline per category, no differentiation, no FAQ.
findings.recommendation: Add a 150-300 word intro per category.

findings.title: Repeated boilerplate CTA sentence across product bodies
findings.description: "Contact our team to confirm current availability" closes many descriptions verbatim at scale.
findings.recommendation: Vary or remove; Quote/Reserve buttons already cover the action.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: Product JSON-LD image URLs, Merchant Center brand type, and OfferShippingDetails all confirmed fixed and live
FAQPage schema now live sitewide on product pages, verified well-formed and matching visible content exactly
BreadcrumbList and hasMerchantReturnPolicy correct and internally consistent

findings.title: availability still hardcoded to InStock regardless of real stock
findings.description: No stock-status field drives it; a sold-out unit would still declare InStock.
findings.recommendation: Add a stockStatus field to the catalog pipeline and map accordingly.

findings.title: BlogPosting schema missing image and publisher.logo
findings.description: Blocks Article rich-result eligibility even though BlogPosting type is otherwise used correctly.
findings.recommendation: Add image and publisher.logo (ImageObject) to the blogPostingJsonLd object.

findings.title: Offer block silently omitted for future price-on-request SKUs
findings.description: Not currently triggered (all 208 products have prices) but latent.
findings.recommendation: Handle the no-price case explicitly.

findings.title: sku field contains a data-quality anomaly on one product
findings.description: One product has sku: "Los_Angeles_CA" — a location string, not a SKU — flowing into Product JSON-LD.
findings.recommendation: Fix the source value or omit the field for that product.

findings.title: Organization schema missing sameAs; CollectionPage lacks ItemList
findings.description: No linked social/profile URLs; category schema doesn't link to shown products.
findings.recommendation: Add once verified profiles exist; add mainEntity ItemList to CollectionPage.

categories.name: Performance (Core Web Vitals)
what_works: CLS excellent everywhere tested (0-0.007)
No third-party script bloat, fast/consistent TTFB (~110-120ms)
Self-hosted product images confirmed loading correctly (HTTP 200) — the July 19 402 outage has not recurred

findings.title: images.unoptimized: true bypasses Next.js Image Optimization entirely
findings.description: Leftover from the old hotlinking-quota workaround; self-hosted images are now served at full resolution with no responsive srcset or WebP/AVIF conversion. A single product hero image is 742KB served at 2320x1740px into a 662x496px box — 92% wasted transfer.
findings.recommendation: Remove the flag now that images are self-hosted; pre-resize source images and use next/image's sizes prop. Expected 60-90% payload reduction.

findings.title: LCP fails 'Good' threshold on all 3 page types on mobile
findings.description: Mobile LCP: homepage 17.5s, category 10.6s, product 18.5s — driven almost entirely by oversized image download time, not TTFB or render delay.
findings.recommendation: Fix the image-optimization root cause above; confirm priority prop (fetchpriority=high) is applied to hero/gallery images.

findings.title: Homepage hero background is a 473KB unconverted PNG and is the LCP element
findings.description: PNG is a poor fit for a photographic hero image; dominates homepage transfer weight and LCP timeline.
findings.recommendation: Re-export as WebP/AVIF and preload via priority.

findings.title: INP proxy (TBT) is 'Needs Improvement' on mobile across all 3 page types
findings.description: 300-430ms mobile TBT, likely CPU contention from hydration compounding with image decode.
findings.recommendation: Re-measure after the image fix; if still elevated, defer non-critical widgets with next/dynamic.

findings.title: Category page text LCP element delayed 3.7-9.8s despite fast TTFB
findings.description: The category <h1> is text, not an image, yet render is delayed well after the document is available.
findings.recommendation: Investigate render-blocking JS/CSS and confirm font-display: swap on the heading font.

categories.name: Visual / Mobile
what_works: Site-wide image failure from prior audit fully resolved — zero broken images, zero console errors, no horizontal scroll across all pages/viewports tested
New /cart/checkout page renders cleanly on desktop and mobile with no layout shift
Payment-method modal well-designed and functions correctly

findings.title: Checkout has no visible order summary despite commit description
findings.description: Commit 49fc49d references an order summary, but the rendered page shows no product name, thumbnail, or price — only a flat '$1,000 deposit due' total.
findings.recommendation: Add a visible order-summary panel showing the reserved unit's name, thumbnail, and price before the submit button.

findings.title: No visible return-policy text on checkout
findings.description: Full-text search of the rendered checkout page for 'return'/'policy' returned zero matches despite the commit message referencing one.
findings.recommendation: Surface the return/deposit policy on the checkout page itself, near the deposit total.

findings.title: Category grid thumbnails have a multi-second render delay
findings.description: Images report full naturalWidth but render as dark placeholder boxes for several seconds after load.
findings.recommendation: Investigate fade-in transition duration or an overly conservative lazy-load threshold; eager-load the first row.

findings.title: 'Add to Cart' tap target undersized on mobile category cards
findings.description: Prior audit measured 147x29px, under the 48px minimum touch-target guidance.
findings.recommendation: Increase min-height to 44-48px on mobile.

findings.title: Category filter chips push inventory ~1.5 screens down on mobile
findings.description: 12+ stacked filter chips before the first product card, unchanged.
findings.recommendation: Collapse into an expandable filter drawer on mobile.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness (GEO)
what_works: Both top prior gaps fixed: /llms.txt is live and well-structured, FAQPage schema + visible Q&A now ship on every product page
robots.txt fully permits all major AI crawlers, full SSR confirmed (raw curl returns complete content and JSON-LD)
New long-form blog guides add citable, topic-specific content beyond product listings

findings.title: No comparison content between similar SKUs
findings.description: 208+ products but still no visible comparison tables (10ft vs 20ft vs 40ft reefer, genset series variants).
findings.recommendation: Add a small comparison table per product family.

findings.title: Weak off-site entity/brand signals
findings.description: Organization schema still lacks sameAs; no Wikipedia/Reddit/YouTube/LinkedIn presence found for the brand.
findings.recommendation: Add sameAs links once real profiles exist; publish short product-walkthrough videos.

findings.title: Blog posts lack subheading structure
findings.description: Guide content has only a single H1 with no H2/H3 subheadings, limiting passage-level extractability.
findings.recommendation: Break each guide into discrete, question-form H2 sections.

findings.title: No dateModified or named author on blog BlogPosting schema
findings.description: datePublished exists but author is the Organization entity, not a named person.
findings.recommendation: Add dateModified on edits and a named author/reviewer persona.

findings.title: Brand-collision risk: containerone.net ranks page-1 for shared queries
findings.description: Off-site naming risk, not fixable through on-page GEO work.
findings.recommendation: Consistent full-brand-name usage in citable content and schema alternateName.

categories.name: E-commerce SEO
what_works: Critical image-schema bug and third-party hotlinking risk both confirmed fixed live; all 208 products self-hosted
Merchant Center brand type fixed; OfferShippingDetails and hasMerchantReturnPolicy newly added
Checkout/contact/newsletter forms migrated off mailto: to real server-side Resend delivery

findings.title: No GTIN/MPN/SKU in Product schema for 95% of catalog
findings.description: Only 11/208 products carry a sku value; the rest emit no identifier or identifier_exists:false — Google Merchant Center requires one or the other.
findings.recommendation: Populate real internal SKUs where they exist; add identifier_exists:false for genuinely GTIN-less custom units.

findings.title: New/Used condition variants collapsed into one page/price on 44% of catalog
findings.description: 91/208 products flatten condition into plain text with a single price/Offer, inconsistent with how grade variants are handled elsewhere.
findings.recommendation: Standardize on distinct slugs/Offers per condition-grade combination.

findings.title: Flat $1,000 deposit exceeds full unit price on 12 catalog items
findings.description: Accessories priced well under $1,000 (e.g. $64.80 lock box) now show a deposit larger than the item price at checkout.
findings.recommendation: Cap the deposit at item price, or route accessories to a simple quote CTA instead of the deposit flow.

findings.title: Image optimization pipeline disabled despite self-hosting fix
findings.description: next.config.ts still sets images.unoptimized:true; several source images sit under the 800px recommendation.
findings.recommendation: Remove the flag and re-source undersized images. (Same root cause as the Performance finding.)

findings.title: 1 product has no images at all
findings.description: Renders a placeholder and omits the schema image field, disqualifying it from rich results.
findings.recommendation: Source at least one photo for the affected SKU.

diagnostic_not_scored.name: Search Experience (SXO) — why aren't we ranking
diagnostic_not_scored.note: Not folded into the Health Score — this is a ranking-cause diagnostic, not a site-health metric.
key_findings: Critical, new this round: zero appearances of containeronedepot.com in Google results for any of 4 target queries or a direct brand-name search — needs a GSC indexation check as the top-priority follow-up.

High: brand-name collision now confirmed against 4 near-identical competitor domains (containerone.net/.com, containerdepotco.com, houstoncontainerdepot.com), with no on-site trust counter-signal (reviews, BBB) to differentiate.
Fixed: product images no longer hotlinked; near-duplicate SKU cannibalization resolved for the named example (3 of 4 remaining pairs still need manual review).

New/Resolved: checkout trust mechanics substantially improved (required payment method, consistent deposit messaging, real server-side email delivery) — though see the Visual/E-commerce findings for new bugs introduced alongside these fixes.

diagnostic_not_scored.name: Backlinks / Off-Page Authority
diagnostic_not_scored.note: Held unchanged — Common Crawl queries timed out this round (no fresh data either direction); expected for a ~18-day-old domain regardless. Not folded into the Health Score.
key_findings: No fresh Common Crawl reading obtained this round (query timed out); prior confirmed-zero result carried forward as last known state.
Brand-collision co-citation check for containerone.net could not run (also timed out) — remains an open watch item.
Realistic near-term tier unchanged: industry/equipment directories + genuine OEM dealer citations (Carrier/Thermo King/CAT/Kubota already referenced in catalog).

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Check Google Search Console URL Inspection on the homepage and top PDPs — the SXO audit found zero visibility for any target query including the brand name itself; confirm there's no noindex/canonical/robots issue blocking indexation

Remove `images.unoptimized: true` from next.config.ts now that images are self-hosted; pre-resize source images to sane max dimensions and use next/image's sizes prop — expected 60-90% image payload reduction and the direct fix for 10.6s-18.5s mobile LCP
Cap the checkout deposit at item price for the 12 sub-$1,000 accessory SKUs in depositFor() (src/lib/cart-context.tsx)
Add a visible order-summary panel (unit name, thumbnail, price) to /cart/checkout before the submit button
Surface return-policy text visibly on the checkout page itself, near the deposit total

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Populate GTIN/MPN/SKU (or identifier_exists:false) for the 197 products currently missing a Product-schema identifier
Standardize distinct slugs/Offers for New/Used condition variants across the 91 affected products
Add a real stock-status field to the catalog data model; stop hardcoding availability to InStock in Product schema
Split the category-page template so searchParams-driven filter/sort/pagination no longer forces the entire route dynamic — restores static/ISR caching on the 8 highest link-equity hub pages
Expand the 4 blog posts toward the word-count floor and add named, credentialed bylines
Add real trust counter-signals (reviews, BBB application, years-in-business once true) to counter the confirmed brand-collision risk with containerone.net and similarly-named competitors

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Add a Content-Security-Policy header via nonce-based middleware
Add unique 150-300 word intro copy to each of the 8 category pages
Add a small comparison table per product family (dimensions/capacity/price/use-case)
Add sameAs to Organization schema once real off-site profiles exist; pursue LinkedIn/YouTube/GBP presence
Add image and publisher.logo to BlogPosting schema for Article rich-result eligibility
Remove the stray thermo-king-sg-3000-clip-on-gensets-1 sitemap entry and add a pre-publish filter that drops any 3xx-responding URL automatically
Add lastmod to /about, /contact, /blog; derive product/category lastmod from real updatedAt rather than a shared build timestamp
Pursue industry directory and OEM/dealer citation opportunities (Carrier, Thermo King, Caterpillar, Kubota)

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Re-run the Common Crawl backlink check (timed out this round) and re-baseline the backlink profile in 60-90 days
Re-measure mobile tap-target sizes for 'Add to Cart' and 'Reserve This Unit' buttons (not re-verified this round)
Add IndexNow integration; collapse the 2-hop bare-HTTP apex redirect at the DNS/edge layer
Add meta noindex to /cart and /search
Fix the bogus sku value ("Los_Angeles_CA") on one product and source a photo for the 1 product with no images
Run a periodic full 225-URL crawl (not just spot-checks) to catch redirected sitemap entries automatically

fixes_applied_during_prior_audit_2026_07: next.config.ts: added images.unoptimized to bypass Vercel's image optimizer (this flag is now the top Performance finding in this audit — needs removal, not preservation)
src/app/product/[slug]/page.tsx: fixed Product JSON-LD image URL concatenation bug affecting all 212 products
src/components/ExpandableText.tsx: full description text now always server-rendered; visual truncation moved to CSS line-clamp
scraper/scripts/build-catalog.js: cleared 44 products' bogus sku values (warehouse-location codes)
scraper/scripts/build-catalog.js + src/lib/catalog.ts: removed sourceUrl/siteName fields exposing competitor URLs from the public repo
